entities.name: GROUNDNUT

entities.name: SHEEP
entities.description: Young sheep used to measure the productivity parameters based on groundnut haulm feeding

entities.name: LIVESTOCK PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The output and performance of livestock, constrained by fodder availability

entities.name: FODDER QUALITY
entities.description: The nutritional value and suitability of groundnut haulms as feed for livestock

entities.description: The amount of pods produced by the groundnut crop

entities.name: HAULM YIELD
entities.description: The amount of haulms produced by the groundnut crop

entities.name: FODDER SHORTAGE
entities.description: A major constraint to high livestock productivity in mixed crop-livestock systems

entities.name: RAINFED SEMI-ARID TROPICS
entities.description: The geographic region where fodder resource availability is limited

entities.name: MIXED CROP-LIVESTOCK SYSTEMS
entities.description: Agricultural systems in developing countries integrating crop production and livestock feeding

entities.name: PRODUCTIVITY MEASUREMENT
entities.description: The process of measuring productivity parameters of young sheep to investigate fodder quality
